data.title: Return to Freedom: Wild horse population estimate shows futility of BLM practice of capture and removal
data.description: In LOMPOC, California, as of March 19, 2026, a recent report reveals the increasing population of wild horses and burros on public lands managed by the Bureau of Land Management (BLM). This data emphasizes the inefficacy of BLM's current strategies. BLM has postponed implementing effective and secure methods to manage the estimated number of these animals, signaling the need for a change in their approach.
Panama says PPC and its affiliates are obstructing transition efforts and concealing key information after port contract cancellations.
ASIAN MARKETS ARE SET FOR A STEADY OPEN AFTER U.S. EQUITIES REBOUNDED AND OIL DECLINED, AS COMMENTS FROM BENJAMIN NETANYAHU AND DONALD TRUMP HELPED EASE CONCERNS OVER ESCALATION IN THE IRAN WAR.
European futures move higher, as Euro Stoxx 50 and DAX futures both climb 0.8%.

data.title: Super Micro Dives As U.S. Accuses Execs Of Smuggling Nvidia Chips To China
data.description: Executives from Super Micro Computer were recently accused by U.S. prosecutors of unlawfully smuggling AI servers equipped with high-end Nvidia chips to China. Following this news, the stock of SMCI plummeted significantly. The allegations of smuggling these advanced components to China have had a negative impact on Super Micro Computer's stock performance.
South Korea’s KOGAS reports ample LNG stockpiles above required levels, ensuring readiness for potential market shocks.
QatarEnergy CEO says Iran strikes have shut 17% of LNG output, with recovery likely to take up to five years-BRICS

data.title: The Tabernacle Choir Marks 250th Anniversary of the United States with Special Music & the Spoken Word Featuring Andy Reid
data.description: Celebrating the 250th anniversary of the United States, The Tabernacle Choir and Orchestra at Temple Square will air a special broadcast of Music & the Spoken Word on Sunday, July 5, 2026. The event will feature Kansas City Chiefs head coach Andy Reid.

data.title: ISC Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Regina, Saskatchewan on March 19, 2026, the Board of Directors of Information Services Corporation approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per Class A Limited Voting Share. This dividend is set to be distributed to shareholders of record as of March 31, 2026, on or before April 15, 2026. Designated as an eligible dividend according to the Income Tax Act, Canadian residents receiving this dividend are eligible for an enhanced dividend tax credit. For detailed information regarding tax implications, it is recommended to seek advice from a tax advisor.

data.title: The Choice of the World's Busiest Airports: How AirportLabs is Redefining Operational Simplicity
data.description: London, 19th March 2026 - The current state of the global aviation industry highlights a notable transition towards prioritizing digital resilience among its key players. Leading hub airports like Dubai International (DXB), which see large volumes of passenger traffic, are emblematic of this shift. This trend reflects a growing emphasis on adapting to digital advancements to navigate challenges effectively.

data.title: Taiwan hosts APEC Workshop Highlights Innovative Technologies for Low-Carbon Food Supply Chains
data.description: In light of increasing climate threats and global food security issues, governments and industries globally are fast-tracking the shift to greener food systems. This includes promoting the growth of a low-carbon food sector and strengthening regional...

data.title: Republic Technologies Closes First Tranche of the Non-Brokered Private Placement of Special Warrants
data.description: Republic Technologies Inc. (CSE: DOCT) (FSE: 7FM0) (OTCQB: DOCKF) has successfully closed the initial tranche of its non-brokered private placement offering of special warrants. In this first tranche, the Company issued a total of 9,523,808 Special Warrants. This update follows the news release made on February 13, 2026. This offering represents a significant development for Republic as it continues to pursue its strategic objectives.
GOLD HEADING FOR STEEPEST WEEKLY DROP IN 6 YEARS, DOWN ~8% AS MIDEAST CONFLICT FUELS INFLATION FEARS & REDUCES RATE CUT EXPECTATIONS
